meta.description: 每天精选高质量英文文章，翻译为中文

articles.title: 2026年AI智能体五大趋势
articles.subtitle: 从自动化工具到自主智能：AI Agent 的范式跃迁
articles.author: USAII Editorial Desk
articles.summary: AI Agent 市场以46.3%的年复合增长率扩张，2026年正成为Agentic AI走向主流的关键节点。本文探讨了AI Agent的五大趋势，包括与物理世界的整合、构建框架演进、深度研究Agent、AI伴侣及人机协作模式。
articles.content_cn:
人工智能（AI）正在从自动化特定工具演变为能够自主完成多种任务的智能代理。随着AI技术的快速变革，2026年将成为AI发展进程中极为关键的一年。围绕通用人工智能（AGI）——能够像人类一样自主推理和学习的机器——的讨论比以往任何时候都更加紧迫。推动这一进步的核心力量之一，正是AI智能体的崛起。虽然AGI仍需数年才能实现，但AI智能体正在以前所未有的速度拓展AI的能力边界，并深刻改变着全球几乎每一个行业。

AI智能体市场正以46.3%的年复合增长率高速扩张，预计市场规模将从2025年的78.4亿美元增长到2030年的526.2亿美元。本文将深入探讨2026年AI智能体的发展趋势、最佳实施实践以及未来展望。

AI智能体：迈向自主性

在2026年，大多数AI工具仍然只能对提示做出反应或执行预定义的工作流程。然而，AI智能体的工作方式截然不同。它们展现出自主性，以目标为导向，能够根据环境变化做出决策。

根据普华永道2025年5月的AI智能体调查，AI智能体的采用正在获得强劲动力：35%的组织报告已广泛采用AI智能体，27%进行了有限采用，17%已在全公司范围内实施，另有15%正在探索使用。这些数据清晰地表明，AI智能体正在迅速成为主流的企业级技术。

这些智能工具能够自主规划、推理和行动，完成管理供应链、编写代码、进行法律研究甚至运营企业部分业务等多种任务。例如，一个AI销售智能体可以自主识别潜在客户并安排会议，还能根据客户行为数据调整销售话术。同样，研究型智能体可以阅读论文、总结洞察并生成新的研究假设。

AI智能体以生成式AI为基础，但在记忆能力、推理模块和API接口方面超越了传统生成式AI，使其能够与数字世界和物理世界进行交互。这种自主能力正在帮助我们逐步接近理想的AI系统愿景。

2026年能否成为AI智能体之年？

2026年可能成为Agentic AI发展的决定性转折点。我们看到多模态AI和边缘计算正在快速进步，它们与现实世界应用的融合也在推动AI智能体的崛起——这些智能体能够感知、行动并适应不同的环境。

OpenAI、Google DeepMind、Anthropic、Meta等公司都在积极实验Agentic AI系统，这些系统已经展现出自主推理、规划和从不同领域学习能力的早期迹象。

AI已经在各个领域创造价值——从提升生产力到降低成本。这驱使组织更快地采用AI智能体以获取商业利益。企业也在部署AI智能体来评估它们管理工作流程和协助客户的效率。

AGI是最终目标，而2026年正是Agentic AI走向主流的转折点。大语言模型已不再是炒作热点——组织需要的是更智能、更小型、更自主的模型，能够在工作场景中协助人类而非仅仅回答问题。

2026年值得关注的五大AI智能体趋势

趋势一：AI智能体与物理世界的融合

明年我们可能看到的最大飞跃，是AI智能体通过机器人技术和物联网与现实世界系统的深度整合。今天的AI智能体还局限在屏幕上——回答问题或处理日常任务。但在不久的将来，它们将帮助机器感知、导航和操作物理环境。

自主仓库机器人、送货无人机和家庭助手正在利用Agentic AI框架和视觉-语言-动作模型。例如，一台AI驱动的清洁机器人可以检测杂乱的房间，规划最佳路线，并与物体交互来清洁房间——无需任何人工帮助。这为利用AI增强日常生活的智能实体机器奠定了基础。

趋势二：AI智能体构建框架的成熟

LangChain、AutoGen、CrewAI、Meta的Agentverse等AI智能体开发框架正在快速演进，帮助组织和开发者以更模块化、更安全、更可扩展的方式构建定制智能体。

这些框架简化了将大语言模型与API和数据库连接的过程。开发者可以指定目标、记忆类型和反馈循环，构建多智能体协作系统——智能体之间可以像人类团队一样协同完成任务。

这些框架在构建领域专用智能体方面非常有用，组织正在利用它们为客户支持、网络安全、研究、软件工程等领域构建智能体。最终目标是构建智能体网络，而非简单的AI工具。

趋势三：深度研究智能体的崛起

2026年一个重要的AI趋势是深度研究智能体（Deep Research Agents）的出现，它们能够流畅地处理复杂的分析和战略工作。在无需人工干预的情况下，这些AI智能体可以自主收集数据、评估信息源、交叉验证事实，并以比人类分析师更快的速度提供高质量、准确的洞察。

这些智能体将在金融、医疗、国防等领域彻底改变情报分析工作。一个深度研究智能体可以处理数千篇学术论文、预测市场趋势、评估法规变化，为战略制定提供支持。

这些Agentic AI系统更像是数字战略家而非简单的AI工具，它们将释放人类专业人才的时间，使其专注于更具创造性和决策性的工作。

趋势四：AI智能体作为个人伙伴

进一步发展，AI智能体将作为专业人员和普通用户的个人助手。除了提升生产力之外，它们还将根据每个用户长期的行为模式提供心理支持、指导和陪伴。

AI伙伴配备了上下文记忆和共情推理能力，可以在以下角色中服务人类：健康教练、虚拟治疗师，甚至终身学习伙伴。

Replika、Inflection的Pi和Character.AI等公司正在开拓以人为本的AI智能体领域。虽然这些产品引发了关于过度依赖和真实性的伦理讨论，但它们确实是改善心理健康的强大工具。

趋势五：Agentic AI中的人类要素

最重要的趋势——人类要素。无论系统多么先进，人类监督都是至关重要的。2026年，成功的实施将采用「人在环路」系统——人类与AI协作实现共同目标。与此同时，伦理治理、可解释模型和用户信任也将成为重点关注领域。为此，组织正在利益相关者中推动AI素养培训。

AI智能体实施：最佳实践

要在关键业务流程中有效实施AI智能体，需要清晰的战略愿景和组织准备。以下是组织可以采取的行动步骤：

明确目标：识别AI智能体能交付最大价值的特定领域，如客户服务、研究自动化、工作流程优化等。选择模块化框架：如前所述，有许多框架可供选择。使用能够与现有工具和数据管道灵活集成的智能体构建平台。伦理考量：建立明确的伦理标准和数据隐私协议，确保系统透明且符合伦理规范。员工培训：推动全员AI素养培训，使员工理解如何使用和监督智能体。从小到大：从小规模试点项目开始，评估性能，收集反馈，然后逐步扩展规模。

结语

虽然AGI的实现仍遥不可及，但至少在2026年，AI智能体已经向这一目标迈出了重要一步。它们展现了真正AGI系统的关键品质——推理能力、自主性和持续学习——这些也是通用智能的核心要素。2026年将被铭记为人类开始赋予机器与之并肩思考和行动能力的一年，而非机器取代人类的一年。AGI确实仍有一段漫长的路要走，但我们构建的每一个智能AI智能体，都在缩短这段距离。
articles.content_en:
Artificial Intelligence (AI) is evolving from automating specific tools into intelligent agents capable of autonomously completing a wide range of tasks. With the rapid transformation of AI technology, 2026 will become a critically important year in the trajectory of AI development. The conversation around Artificial General Intelligence (AGI) -- machines that can reason and learn autonomously like humans -- has become more urgent than ever. One of the core driving forces behind this progress is the rise of AI agents. Although AGI remains years away, AI agents are expanding the boundaries of AI capabilities at an unprecedented pace and profoundly transforming nearly every industry across the globe.

The AI agent market is expanding rapidly at a compound annual growth rate of 46.3%, with its projected market size growing from $7.84 billion in 2025 to $526.2 billion by 2030. This article provides an in-depth exploration of AI agent trends, best implementation practices, and future outlook for 2026.

AI Agents: Towards Autonomy

In 2026, most AI tools still only react to prompts or execute predefined workflows. AI agents, however, operate quite differently. They exhibit autonomy, are goal-oriented, and can make decisions based on changes in their environment.

According to PwC's AI Agent Survey from May 2025, AI agent adoption is gaining strong momentum: 35% of organizations report broad adoption, 27% have limited adoption, 17% have implemented them company-wide, and another 15% are exploring their use. These figures clearly indicate that AI agents are rapidly becoming a mainstream enterprise technology.

These intelligent tools can autonomously plan, reason, and act, completing a variety of tasks such as managing supply chains, writing code, conducting legal research, and even running parts of businesses. For example, an AI sales agent can autonomously identify potential customers and schedule meetings, and adjust its sales pitch based on customer behavior data. Similarly, a research agent can read papers, summarize insights, and generate new research hypotheses.

AI agents are built on generative AI but go beyond it in terms of memory capabilities, reasoning modules, and API interfaces, enabling them to interact with both the digital and physical worlds. This autonomous capability is helping us progressively approach the ideal vision of AI systems.

Can 2026 Be the Year of AI Agents?

2026 could become a defining turning point for the development of Agentic AI. We are seeing rapid advances in multimodal AI and edge computing, and their integration with real-world applications is also driving the rise of AI agents -- agents that can perceive, act, and adapt to different environments.

Companies like OpenAI, Google DeepMind, Anthropic, and Meta are all actively experimenting with Agentic AI systems that have already shown early signs of autonomous reasoning, planning, and the ability to learn from different domains.

AI is already creating value across various fields -- from boosting productivity to reducing costs. This is driving organizations to adopt AI agents more quickly to capture business benefits. Enterprises are also deploying AI agents to evaluate how effectively they manage workflows and assist customers.

AGI is the ultimate goal, and 2026 is the turning point where Agentic AI goes mainstream. Large language models are no longer the hype -- organizations need smarter, smaller, more autonomous models that can assist humans in work settings rather than merely answering questions.

Top 5 AI Agent Trends to Watch in 2026

Trend 1: Integration of AI Agents with the Physical World

The biggest leap we may see next year is the deep integration of AI agents with real-world systems through robotics and IoT. Today's AI agents are still confined to screens -- answering questions or handling routine tasks. But in the near future, they will help machines perceive, navigate, and manipulate physical environments.

Autonomous warehouse robots, delivery drones, and home assistants are leveraging Agentic AI frameworks and vision-language-action models. For example, an AI-powered cleaning robot can detect a cluttered room, plan the optimal route, and interact with objects to clean the room -- all without any human assistance. This lays the foundation for intelligent physical machines that use AI to enhance daily life.

Trend 2: The Maturation of AI Agent Building Frameworks

AI agent development frameworks such as LangChain, AutoGen, CrewAI, and Meta's Agentverse are rapidly evolving, helping organizations and developers build custom agents in a more modular, secure, and scalable manner.

These frameworks simplify the process of connecting large language models with APIs and databases. Developers can specify goals, memory types, and feedback loops to build multi-agent collaborative systems -- where agents can work together to complete tasks like a human team.

These frameworks are highly useful for building domain-specific agents, and organizations are leveraging them to build agents for customer support, cybersecurity, research, software engineering, and more. The ultimate goal is to build networks of agents, not simple AI tools.

Trend 3: The Rise of Deep Research Agents

A major AI trend in 2026 is the emergence of Deep Research Agents, which can smoothly handle complex analytical and strategic work. Without any human intervention, these AI agents can autonomously collect data, evaluate information sources, cross-verify facts, and deliver high-quality, accurate insights faster than human analysts.

These agents will revolutionize intelligence analysis in fields such as finance, healthcare, and defense. A Deep Research Agent can process thousands of academic papers, forecast market trends, and evaluate regulatory changes to support strategy formulation.

These Agentic AI systems are more like digital strategists than simple AI tools. They will free up human professionals' time to focus on more creative and decision-oriented work.

Trend 4: AI Agents as Personal Companions

Going further, AI agents will serve as personal assistants for both professionals and general users. Beyond boosting productivity, they will provide psychological support, guidance, and companionship based on each user's long-term behavioral patterns.

AI companions equipped with contextual memory and empathetic reasoning can serve humans in the following roles: wellness coaches, virtual therapists, and even lifelong learning partners.

Companies like Replika, Inflection's Pi, and Character.AI are pioneering the field of human-centric AI agents. While these products have sparked ethical debates about over-reliance and authenticity, they are indeed powerful tools for improving mental health.

Trend 5: The Human Element in Agentic AI

The most important trend -- the human element. No matter how advanced systems become, human oversight is essential. In 2026, successful implementations will adopt "human-in-the-loop" systems, where humans and AI collaborate to achieve shared goals. At the same time, ethical governance, explainable models, and user trust will also become key focus areas. To this end, organizations are promoting AI literacy training among stakeholders.

AI Agent Implementation: Best Practices

Effectively implementing AI agents in critical business processes requires a clear strategic vision and organizational readiness. Here are the action steps organizations can take:

Define clear objectives: Identify specific areas where AI agents can deliver the greatest value, such as customer service, research automation, and workflow optimization. Choose modular frameworks: As mentioned earlier, there are many frameworks to choose from. Use agent-building platforms that can flexibly integrate with existing tools and data pipelines. Ethical considerations: Establish clear ethical standards and data privacy protocols to ensure systems are transparent and ethically compliant. Employee training: Promote company-wide AI literacy training so employees understand how to use and oversee agents. Start small, scale up: Begin with small pilot projects, evaluate performance, gather feedback, and then gradually scale up.

Conclusion

Although achieving AGI remains a distant goal, at least in 2026, AI agents have already taken a significant step toward it. They demonstrate the key qualities of true AGI systems -- reasoning ability, autonomy, and continuous learning -- which are also the core elements of general intelligence. 2026 will be remembered as the year humans began endowing machines with the ability to think and act alongside them, rather than the year machines replaced humans. AGI still has a long way to go, but every intelligent AI agent we build is shortening that distance.

paragraphs.en: AI agent development frameworks such as LangChain, AutoGen, CrewAI, and Meta's Agentverse are rapidly evolving, helping organizations and developers build custom agents in a more modular, secure, and scalable manner.

paragraphs.cn: 这些框架简化了将大语言模型与API和数据库连接的过程。开发者可以指定目标、记忆类型和反馈循环，构建多智能体协作系统——智能体之间可以像人类团队一样协同完成任务。
paragraphs.en: These frameworks simplify the process of connecting large language models with APIs and databases. Developers can specify goals, memory types, and feedback loops to build multi-agent collaborative systems -- where agents can work together to complete tasks like a human team.

paragraphs.cn: 这些框架在构建领域专用智能体方面非常有用，组织正在利用它们为客户支持、网络安全、研究、软件工程等领域构建智能体。最终目标是构建智能体网络，而非简单的AI工具。
paragraphs.en: These frameworks are highly useful for building domain-specific agents, and organizations are leveraging them to build agents for customer support, cybersecurity, research, software engineering, and more. The ultimate goal is to build networks of agents, not simple AI tools.

paragraphs.cn: 趋势三：深度研究智能体的崛起
paragraphs.en: Trend 3: The Rise of Deep Research Agents

paragraphs.cn: 2026年一个重要的AI趋势是深度研究智能体（Deep Research Agents）的出现，它们能够流畅地处理复杂的分析和战略工作。在无需人工干预的情况下，这些AI智能体可以自主收集数据、评估信息源、交叉验证事实，并以比人类分析师更快的速度提供高质量、准确的洞察。
paragraphs.en: A major AI trend in 2026 is the emergence of Deep Research Agents, which can smoothly handle complex analytical and strategic work. Without any human intervention, these AI agents can autonomously collect data, evaluate information sources, cross-verify facts, and deliver high-quality, accurate insights faster than human analysts.

paragraphs.cn: 这些智能体将在金融、医疗、国防等领域彻底改变情报分析工作。一个深度研究智能体可以处理数千篇学术论文、预测市场趋势、评估法规变化，为战略制定提供支持。
paragraphs.en: These agents will revolutionize intelligence analysis in fields such as finance, healthcare, and defense. A Deep Research Agent can process thousands of academic papers, forecast market trends, and evaluate regulatory changes to support strategy formulation.

paragraphs.cn: 这些Agentic AI系统更像是数字战略家而非简单的AI工具，它们将释放人类专业人才的时间，使其专注于更具创造性和决策性的工作。
paragraphs.en: These Agentic AI systems are more like digital strategists than simple AI tools. They will free up human professionals' time to focus on more creative and decision-oriented work.

paragraphs.cn: 趋势四：AI智能体作为个人伙伴
paragraphs.en: Trend 4: AI Agents as Personal Companions

paragraphs.cn: 进一步发展，AI智能体将作为专业人员和普通用户的个人助手。除了提升生产力之外，它们还将根据每个用户长期的行为模式提供心理支持、指导和陪伴。
paragraphs.en: Going further, AI agents will serve as personal assistants for both professionals and general users. Beyond boosting productivity, they will provide psychological support, guidance, and companionship based on each user's long-term behavioral patterns.

paragraphs.cn: AI伙伴配备了上下文记忆和共情推理能力，可以在以下角色中服务人类：健康教练、虚拟治疗师，甚至终身学习伙伴。
paragraphs.en: AI companions equipped with contextual memory and empathetic reasoning can serve humans in the following roles: wellness coaches, virtual therapists, and even lifelong learning partners.

paragraphs.cn: Replika、Inflection的Pi和Character.AI等公司正在开拓以人为本的AI智能体领域。虽然这些产品引发了关于过度依赖和真实性的伦理讨论，但它们确实是改善心理健康的强大工具。
paragraphs.en: Companies like Replika, Inflection's Pi, and Character.AI are pioneering the field of human-centric AI agents. While these products have sparked ethical debates about over-reliance and authenticity, they are indeed powerful tools for improving mental health.

paragraphs.cn: 趋势五：Agentic AI中的人类要素
paragraphs.en: Trend 5: The Human Element in Agentic AI

paragraphs.cn: 最重要的趋势——人类要素。无论系统多么先进，人类监督都是至关重要的。2026年，成功的实施将采用「人在环路」系统——人类与AI协作实现共同目标。与此同时，伦理治理、可解释模型和用户信任也将成为重点关注领域。为此，组织正在利益相关者中推动AI素养培训。
paragraphs.en: The most important trend -- the human element. No matter how advanced systems become, human oversight is essential. In 2026, successful implementations will adopt "human-in-the-loop" systems, where humans and AI collaborate to achieve shared goals. At the same time, ethical governance, explainable models, and user trust will also become key focus areas. To this end, organizations are promoting AI literacy training among stakeholders.

paragraphs.cn: AI智能体实施：最佳实践
paragraphs.en: AI Agent Implementation: Best Practices

paragraphs.cn: 要在关键业务流程中有效实施AI智能体，需要清晰的战略愿景和组织准备。以下是组织可以采取的行动步骤：
paragraphs.en: Effectively implementing AI agents in critical business processes requires a clear strategic vision and organizational readiness. Here are the action steps organizations can take:

paragraphs.cn: 明确目标：识别AI智能体能交付最大价值的特定领域，如客户服务、研究自动化、工作流程优化等。选择模块化框架：如前所述，有许多框架可供选择。使用能够与现有工具和数据管道灵活集成的智能体构建平台。伦理考量：建立明确的伦理标准和数据隐私协议，确保系统透明且符合伦理规范。员工培训：推动全员AI素养培训，使员工理解如何使用和监督智能体。从小到大：从小规模试点项目开始，评估性能，收集反馈，然后逐步扩展规模。
paragraphs.en: Define clear objectives: Identify specific areas where AI agents can deliver the greatest value, such as customer service, research automation, and workflow optimization. Choose modular frameworks: As mentioned earlier, there are many frameworks to choose from. Use agent-building platforms that can flexibly integrate with existing tools and data pipelines. Ethical considerations: Establish clear ethical standards and data privacy protocols to ensure systems are transparent and ethically compliant. Employee training: Promote company-wide AI literacy training so employees understand how to use and oversee agents. Start small, scale up: Begin with small pilot projects, evaluate performance, gather feedback, and then gradually scale up.

paragraphs.cn: 结语
paragraphs.en: Conclusion

paragraphs.cn: 虽然AGI的实现仍遥不可及，但至少在2026年，AI智能体已经向这一目标迈出了重要一步。它们展现了真正AGI系统的关键品质——推理能力、自主性和持续学习——这些也是通用智能的核心要素。2026年将被铭记为人类开始赋予机器与之并肩思考和行动能力的一年，而非机器取代人类的一年。AGI确实仍有一段漫长的路要走，但我们构建的每一个智能AI智能体，都在缩短这段距离。
paragraphs.en: Although achieving AGI remains a distant goal, at least in 2026, AI agents have already taken a significant step toward it. They demonstrate the key qualities of true AGI systems -- reasoning ability, autonomy, and continuous learning -- which are also the core elements of general intelligence. 2026 will be remembered as the year humans began endowing machines with the ability to think and act alongside them, rather than the year machines replaced humans. AGI still has a long way to go, but every intelligent AI agent we build is shortening that distance.

articles.title: 检索的悖论：韩炳哲对数字资本主义的批判
articles.subtitle: 他者、同一性与数字资本主义的逻辑张力
articles.author: Tingting He
articles.source: Humanities and Social Sciences Communications (Nature Portfolio)
articles.summary: 韩炳哲提出，应通过重构'他者'的异质性来抵抗数字资本主义施加的同质化压力。然而，其批判逻辑本身依赖于辩证法、速度和沉思——这些恰恰是数字资本主义框架内的产物，使他的方案陷入无法企及的悖论之中。
articles.content_cn:
在全面数字化的时代，我们面临一个深刻的悖论：前所未有地，如此多的人能够接触到如此多的信息——然而，正如韩裔德国哲学家韩炳哲所言，我们从未如此缺乏真正的知识。信息不等于知识，检索不等于理解，连接不等于沟通。这位当代最具影响力的公共哲学家直指数字资本主义的核心矛盾：我们检索得越多，实际知道的越少。

韩炳哲将我们的时代描述为「数字过度活跃」的时代——一个以持续连接取代真正理解的社会。我们以为自己知道得更多，因为我们能够获取更多信息。但获取并不等于理解。「检索已经成为一种逃避形式，」韩炳哲写道，「我们检索信息不是为了深化知识，而是为了逃避思考的劳动。」在Google和ChatGPT触手可及的时代，我们不再需要记住任何东西，也不再需要深入思考任何问题——只需搜索即可。但这种便利的代价是深层认知能力的退化：我们正在失去沉思、质疑和独立思考的能力。

现代数字平台在架构上被设计为阻止深度思考。无限滚动、通知提醒、算法推荐——每一个机制都被精心设计以捕获和碎片化注意力。用户在社交媒体上的平均会话时间只有几分钟，但每天会打开数十次——这种碎片化的使用模式使任何形式的深度沉浸都不可能发生。与此形成对比的是古典沉思的理想——缓慢阅读一本困难的著作，让思想在安静中展开，允许困惑和不确定性的存在。韩炳哲指出，数字资本主义的注意力经济恰恰在摧毁这种沉思的能力。

韩炳哲对「透明社会」的批判揭示了更深层的问题。当代文化将透明视为最高价值——一切都应该是可见的、可获取的、可测量的。但韩炳哲认为，真正的思想需要不透明——需要秘密、需要沉思的空间、需要不被立即消费的思考时间。当一切都被迫透明化时，深度思考本身就成为不可能。社交媒体上的「公开日记」文化、工作中的「全天候在线」期望、教育中的「学习分析」——这些看似进步的做法实际上在消灭思想生长所需的黑暗和安静。

在数字时代的「肯定性」文化中，韩炳哲发现了一种新的统治形式。不同于工业社会以「你应该」的超我命令运作，当代成就社会以「你可以」的积极鼓励运行。这种表面上解放性的话语实际上制造了自我剥削的主体——我们自愿地在数字平台上消耗注意力、生产数据，误以为自己在自由选择，实际上是在参与一种更精细的控制。点赞文化是这种肯定性暴政的完美体现——一个没有否定性、没有摩擦、没有阻力的光滑世界。

对于如何在数字时代保持思考能力，韩炳哲提出了几个关键建议：培养「无聊」的能力——在不被刺激填充的空白时间中让思想自然涌现；重建深度阅读的习惯——不是浏览和扫描，而是缓慢地、反复地与一个文本对话；以及最重要的，认识到真正的知识不是信息的累积，而是一种通过沉思、质疑和批判性思考而获得的深层理解。在信息泛滥的时代，学会不去检索——学会忍受不知道——可能是通向真正知识的第一步。
articles.content_en:
In the age of total digitization, we face a profound paradox: never before have so many people had access to so much information -- yet, as Korean-German philosopher Byung-Chul Han argues, we have never been so lacking in genuine knowledge. Information is not knowledge, retrieval is not understanding, and connection is not communication. This contemporary philosopher, one of the most influential public intellectuals today, strikes at the core contradiction of digital capitalism: the more we retrieve, the less we actually know.

Han describes our era as one of "digital hyperactivity" -- a society that has replaced genuine understanding with constant connectivity. We believe we know more because we can access more information. But access is not understanding. "Retrieval has become a form of avoidance," Han writes. "We retrieve information not to deepen our knowledge, but to escape the labor of thinking." In an age where Google and ChatGPT are always at our fingertips, we no longer need to remember anything or think deeply about any question -- just search. But the price of this convenience is the degradation of deep cognitive abilities: we are losing the capacity for contemplation, questioning, and independent thinking.

Modern digital platforms are architecturally designed to prevent deep thinking. Infinite scrolling, notification alerts, algorithmic recommendations -- every mechanism is carefully engineered to capture and fragment attention. The average user session on social media lasts only a few minutes, but they open it dozens of times per day -- this fragmented usage pattern makes any form of deep immersion impossible. In contrast stands the classical ideal of contemplation -- slowly reading a difficult work, letting thoughts unfold in silence, allowing for confusion and uncertainty to exist. Han points out that the attention economy of digital capitalism is precisely what is destroying this capacity for contemplation.

Han's critique of the "transparency society" reveals a deeper problem. Contemporary culture treats transparency as the highest value -- everything should be visible, accessible, and measurable. But Han argues that genuine thought requires opacity -- it needs secrets, spaces for contemplation, and time for thinking that is not immediately consumed. When everything is forced into transparency, deep thinking itself becomes impossible. The "public diary" culture on social media, the "always-on" expectation in the workplace, "learning analytics" in education -- these seemingly progressive practices are actually eliminating the darkness and quiet that thought needs to grow.

In the "affirmative" culture of the digital age, Han identifies a new form of domination. Unlike industrial society, which operated through the superego command of "you should," the contemporary achievement society runs on the positive encouragement of "you can." This seemingly liberating discourse actually produces self-exploiting subjects -- we voluntarily consume attention and produce data on digital platforms, mistakenly believing we are making free choices, when in fact we are participating in a more refined form of control. The "like" culture is the perfect embodiment of this tyranny of positivity -- a smooth world without negation, without friction, without resistance.

Regarding how to maintain the capacity for thinking in the digital age, Han offers several key suggestions: cultivate the ability to be "bored" -- let thoughts naturally emerge in unstimulated blank time; rebuild the habit of deep reading -- not browsing and scanning, but slowly and repeatedly engaging in dialogue with a text; and most importantly, recognize that genuine knowledge is not the accumulation of information, but a deep understanding acquired through contemplation, questioning, and critical thinking. In an age of information overload, learning not to retrieve -- learning to endure not knowing -- may be the first step toward genuine knowledge.

articles.title: 2026年最强LLM权威指南
articles.subtitle: 从GPT-5到Llama 4：2026年大模型格局全解析
articles.author: Cole
articles.summary: 2026年，闭源前沿模型与开源模型之间的能力差距已大幅收窄。本文深入解析GPT-5、Claude 4、Llama 4、Mistral 3等主流大模型的架构创新、性能表现与许可证差异，为企业选型提供全面参考。
articles.content_cn:
2026年的AI格局不是一场马拉松，而是一场多项全能比赛。不存在单一的「最佳」AI模型——成功取决于在特定应用场景中选择正确的工具。从通用推理到代码生成，从创意媒体到科学发现，不同模型在不同赛道上展开激烈竞争。理解这些差异，是技术决策者的核心能力。

在通用智能与多模态推理赛道上，三大巨头领跑。OpenAI的GPT-5是一个「统一系统」，通过内部路由器实时选择最适合的模型来处理每个请求——简单问题交给快速模型（毫秒级响应），复杂问题升级到深度推理模型（数十秒的多步推理）。这种动态路由机制使GPT-5能够在速度和深度之间自动平衡，用户无需手动选择使用「快模型」还是「慢模型」。Google的Gemini 2.5 Pro基于稀疏混合专家（MoE）架构，能处理文本、音频、图像和视频，其突出特点是「思考模型」能力——动态分配算力来推理复杂问题，在数学和科学推理任务上展现出强大实力。Anthropic的Claude 4.5则被设计为能够「自主工作数小时」的Agent系统，在长任务的一致性和可靠性上表现出色，特别适合需要持续关注和跨步骤记忆的复杂编程任务。

在代码与自动化赛道上，AI编码已经从辅助工具进化为核心开发引擎。GitHub Copilot、Cursor和Claude Code等工具使得42%的新代码包含AI辅助生成的成分。SWE-bench基准测试显示，领先的AI编码Agent已经能够独立解决约80%的真实GitHub问题。但编码AI的竞争不仅在准确性上，更在于对项目上下文的理解深度、多文件协调能力和自主调试能力。Claude Code以80.9%的SWE-bench验证得分领先，Codex CLI以77.3%紧随其后，且完全开源。

在创意生成赛道上，图像、视频和音频生成模型的质量突飞猛进。Stable Diffusion 4和DALL-E 3在图像生成质量上已接近专业水平，能够精确遵循复杂的文本描述生成图像。Sora和Runway Gen-3使AI视频生成从实验走向实用，支持从文本描述生成数分钟的连贯视频。音频生成模型能够创造出令人难以区分真假的音乐和语音。这些进步正在重新定义创意产业的边界——从广告设计到电影制作，从音乐创作到游戏开发。

在科学发现赛道上，AI正在成为研究人员的「超级助手」。DeepMind的AlphaFold 3将蛋白质结构预测扩展到几乎所有的生物分子。AI在材料科学中发现了新催化剂和新超导材料候选。在数学领域，AI系统开始协助证明长期未解决的猜想。在药物发现中，AI将候选药物的筛选时间从数年缩短到数月。

开源生态的蓬勃发展是2026年AI领域最令人鼓舞的趋势之一。Llama 4、DeepSeek V4、Qwen 3和Mistral系列等开源模型在能力和效率上持续追赶闭源前沿，为企业提供了灵活且经济的选择。选择正确的AI模型需要理解几个关键维度：任务类型、部署约束、成本预算和安全合规要求。在这个多元竞争的时代，理解选择的权衡，比选择本身更加重要。

在代码与自动化赛道上，AI编码已经从辅助工具进化为核心开发引擎。GitHub Copilot、Cursor和Claude Code等工具使得42%的新代码包含AI辅助生成的成分。SWE-bench基准测试显示，领先的AI编码Agent已经能够独立解决约70-80%的真实GitHub问题。但编码AI的竞争不仅在准确性上，更在于对项目上下文的理解深度、多文件协调能力和自主调试能力。Claude 4.5 Sonnet以70.6%的SWE-bench得分领先，展示了专门的编码能力。

在创意生成赛道上，图像、视频和音频生成模型的质量突飞猛进。Midjourney v7在艺术视觉方面保持领先，Google Imagen 4在照片级真实感上表现出色。Sora和Runway Gen-3使AI视频生成从实验走向实用，支持从文本描述生成连贯的视频内容。这些进步正在重新定义创意产业的边界。

在科学发现赛道上，AI正在成为研究人员的「超级助手」。DeepMind的AlphaFold 3将蛋白质结构预测扩展到几乎所有的生物分子，提供了至少50%的改进。GNoME发现了38万个新的稳定材料候选。这些「发现引擎」与GPT-5等「知识引擎」形成了鲜明对比——前者创造新知识，后者重组现有知识。

从技术架构角度看，2026年有几个关键趋势值得关注。检索增强生成（RAG）是最经济高效的方法，通过将外部知识库的检索结果注入提示来增强LLM的能力。混合专家（MoE）架构是另一个关键创新——它允许模型拥有大量总参数但只激活其中一小部分，大幅提升了训练和推理效率。Kimi K2的万亿参数和Llama 4的1000万token上下文窗口都展示了这种架构的威力。

选择正确的AI模型需要理解几个关键维度：任务类型、部署约束、成本预算和安全合规要求。在这个多元竞争的时代，理解选择的权衡，比选择本身更加重要。现代开发者的核心技能不再是使用单一模型，而是系统架构能力——正确识别问题，选择专精模型，并将其整合为高效、经济的系统。

概念一：检索增强生成（RAG）是最经济高效的方法，通过将外部知识库的检索结果注入提示来增强LLM的能力。RAG的工作流程分为四个步骤：查询——用户提出问题；检索——查询被发送到检索器，在向量数据库中搜索最相关的文档片段；增强——将检索到的片段注入用户的提示中；生成——LLM使用增强后的提示生成有事实依据的回答。这种方法使AI系统能够利用实时数据和私有知识库，而无需进行昂贵的完整模型重训练。

概念二：Transformer与混合专家（MoE）是2026年最关键的架构创新。传统的密集Transformer在处理每个token时都会激活所有参数，计算开销巨大。MoE模型用「稀疏」层替换单一的FFN层——包含一个「门控网络」（路由器）和多个小型「专家」。当token到达时，路由器只将它发送给少数几个专家。结果是模型可以拥有巨大的总参数量（如Kimi K2的万亿参数），但每次推理只使用其中的一小部分。这使得训练和推理的速度和效率大幅提升。

概念三：混合Transformer-Mamba（Hymba）是架构的下一个进化方向，专为最大推理效率而设计。NVIDIA的Nemotron模型采用了这种架构，将大部分自注意力层替换为Mamba层，只保留足够的注意力头用于高分辨率回忆，同时使用高效的Mamba层进行上下文摘要。结果是「同等准确度」下推理速度提升「最高3倍」。

成本效益分析揭示了2026年AI竞争的另一个维度。Claude 4.5 Sonnet以每任务0.56美元的成本获得70.6%的SWE-bench得分，而GPT-5 mini以仅0.04美元的成本获得59.8%的得分。这使「最佳」模型变成了一个生产级的成本效益分析问题。创业公司的最佳选择可能是「足够好」的最便宜模型——这推动了智能路由器的兴起，先用便宜模型处理，只在任务失败时才升级到昂贵的高性能模型。现代开发者的核心技能不再是使用单一模型，而是系统架构能力——正确识别问题，选择专精模型，并将其整合为高效、经济的系统。

概念四：宪法AI（CAI）是Anthropic的核心对齐技术。它通过两阶段的自纠正过程来构建安全、有用且诚实的AI系统。在监督阶段，AI被赋予一组「宪法」原则，然后被要求根据这些原则来批评和重写自己的回答。这些自纠正的数据被用于微调模型。在强化学习阶段，过程重复进行，训练一个偏好模型来为标准微调提供奖励信号。结果是AI系统对齐于一组明确的、可审查的原则，带来了Claude 4.5所展示的「显著改善的安全性能」。

2026年AI竞赛的结论是：不存在单一的赢家，而是一个专业系统的组合。顶级性能的差距如此之小，以至于「最佳」模型不再是一个简单的「谁」，而是一个「哪个」——哪个模型是为你的特定任务而设计的？对于通用对话和人类偏好，Google Gemini 2.5 Pro领先；对于自主编码和bug修复，Claude 4.5 Sonnet是冠军；对于长上下文数据处理，Meta的Llama 4 Scout以1000万token上下文窗口改变了游戏规则。最终，「AI竞赛」的胜利者将是那些能够正确识别问题、选择专精模型并将其整合为高效系统的人。

开源世界的崛起也是这一格局的重要组成部分。虽然闭源模型在能力上仍有优势，但Meta的Llama 4 Scout以1000万token上下文窗口这样的突破性特性，使大规模数据分析不再局限于昂贵的闭源API。Moonshot的Kimi K2作为中国顶尖AI竞争力的代表，在Tau2 Bench电信智能体基准上排名第一，证明了AI竞争已不再局限于美国。这种全球化竞争的格局正在加速AI技术的整体进步。
articles.content_en:
The AI landscape of 2026 is not a marathon but a decathlon. There is no single "best" AI model -- success depends on choosing the right tool for the right scenario. From general-purpose reasoning to code generation, from creative media to scientific discovery, different models compete intensely on different tracks. Understanding these differences is a core competency for technology decision-makers.

In the general intelligence and multimodal reasoning track, three giants lead the pack. OpenAI's GPT-5 is a "unified system" that uses an internal router to select the most suitable model for each request in real time -- simple questions go to a fast model (millisecond response), while complex ones are escalated to a deep reasoning model (multi-step reasoning over tens of seconds). This dynamic routing mechanism allows GPT-5 to automatically balance speed and depth, so users never need to manually choose between a "fast" or "slow" model. Google's Gemini 2.5 Pro, built on a sparse Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) architecture, handles text, audio, images, and video. Its standout feature is "thinking model" capability -- dynamically allocating compute to reason through complex problems, showing impressive strength on mathematical and scientific reasoning tasks. Anthropic's Claude 4.5 is designed as an agent system that can "work autonomously for hours," excelling in consistency and reliability on long-running tasks, particularly suited for complex programming tasks that require sustained attention and cross-step memory.

In the code and automation track, AI coding has evolved from an assistive tool into a core development engine. Tools like GitHub Copilot, Cursor, and Claude Code now contribute to 42% of all new code. The SWE-bench benchmark shows that leading AI coding agents can independently resolve around 80% of real GitHub issues. But the competition in coding AI isn't just about accuracy -- it's about depth of project context understanding, multi-file coordination, and autonomous debugging. Claude Code leads with an 80.9% verified SWE-bench score, followed closely by Codex CLI at 77.3%, which is fully open source.

In the creative generation track, the quality of image, video, and audio generation models has advanced dramatically. Stable Diffusion 4 and DALL-E 3 have reached near-professional levels in image generation, capable of precisely following complex text descriptions to produce images. Sora and Runway Gen-3 have moved AI video generation from experimentation to practicality, supporting the creation of minutes-long coherent video from text descriptions. Audio generation models can now produce music and speech that is nearly indistinguishable from the real thing. These advances are redefining the boundaries of the creative industry -- from advertising design to film production, from music composition to game development.

In the scientific discovery track, AI is becoming a "super assistant" for researchers. DeepMind's AlphaFold 3 has extended protein structure prediction to nearly all biological molecules. AI has discovered new catalysts and candidate superconducting materials in materials science. In mathematics, AI systems are beginning to help prove long-standing conjectures. In drug discovery, AI has reduced candidate drug screening time from years to months.

The thriving open-source ecosystem is one of the most encouraging trends in AI in 2026. Open-source models like Llama 4, DeepSeek V4, Qwen 3, and the Mistral series continue to close the gap with closed-source frontiers in capability and efficiency, offering enterprises flexible and cost-effective alternatives. Choosing the right AI model requires understanding several key dimensions: task type, deployment constraints, cost budget, and security compliance requirements. In this era of multi-dimensional competition, understanding the trade-offs matters more than the choice itself.

In the code and automation track, AI coding has evolved from an assistive tool into a core development engine. Tools like GitHub Copilot, Cursor, and Claude Code now contribute to 42% of all new code. The SWE-bench benchmark shows that leading AI coding agents can independently resolve about 70-80% of real GitHub issues. But the competition in coding AI isn't just about accuracy -- it's about depth of project context understanding, multi-file coordination, and autonomous debugging. Claude 4.5 Sonnet leads with a 70.6% SWE-bench score, demonstrating specialized coding capability.

In the creative generation track, the quality of image, video, and audio generation models has advanced dramatically. Midjourney v7 maintains its lead in artistic visuals, while Google Imagen 4 excels in photorealistic fidelity. Sora and Runway Gen-3 have moved AI video generation from experimentation to practicality, supporting coherent video content generated from text descriptions. These advances are redefining the boundaries of the creative industry.

In the scientific discovery track, AI is becoming a "super assistant" for researchers. DeepMind's AlphaFold 3 has extended protein structure prediction to nearly all biological molecules, delivering at least a 50% improvement. GNoME has discovered 380,000 new candidate stable materials. These "discovery engines" contrast sharply with "knowledge engines" like GPT-5 -- the former creates new knowledge, while the latter recombines existing knowledge.

From a technical architecture perspective, several key trends in 2026 are worth watching. Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) is the most cost-effective approach, enhancing LLM capabilities by injecting retrieval results from external knowledge bases into prompts. Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) architecture is another critical innovation -- it allows models to have a large total parameter count while only activating a small fraction at a time, significantly improving training and inference efficiency. Kimi K2's trillion parameters and Llama 4's 10-million-token context window both showcase the power of this architecture.

Choosing the right AI model requires understanding several key dimensions: task type, deployment constraints, cost budget, and security compliance requirements. In this era of multi-dimensional competition, understanding the trade-offs matters more than the choice itself. The core skill for modern developers is no longer using a single model but rather systems architecture -- correctly identifying problems, selecting specialized models, and integrating them into efficient, cost-effective systems.

Concept 1: Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) is the most cost-effective approach, enhancing LLM capabilities by injecting retrieval results from external knowledge bases into prompts. The RAG workflow has four steps: Query -- the user asks a question; Retrieval -- the query is sent to a retriever that searches a vector database for the most relevant document fragments; Augmentation -- the retrieved fragments are injected into the user's prompt; Generation -- the LLM uses the augmented prompt to produce a fact-grounded response. This approach enables AI systems to leverage real-time data and private knowledge bases without expensive full model retraining.

Concept 2: Transformers and Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) are the most critical architectural innovations of 2026. Traditional dense Transformers activate all parameters for every token, creating enormous computational overhead. MoE models replace the single FFN layer with "sparse" layers -- containing a "gating network" (router) and multiple small "experts." When a token arrives, the router sends it to only a few experts. The result is that a model can have a massive total parameter count (such as Kimi K2's trillion parameters) while using only a small fraction per inference. This dramatically improves both training and inference speed and efficiency.

Concept 3: The hybrid Transformer-Mamba (Hymba) architecture represents the next evolutionary direction, designed for maximum inference efficiency. NVIDIA's Nemotron model adopts this architecture, replacing most self-attention layers with Mamba layers while retaining just enough attention heads for high-resolution recall, and using efficient Mamba layers for context summarization. The result is "up to 3x" inference speedup at "equivalent accuracy."

Cost-effectiveness analysis reveals another dimension of the 2026 AI competition. Claude 4.5 Sonnet achieves a 70.6% SWE-bench score at $0.56 per task, while GPT-5 mini achieves 59.8% at only $0.04 per task. This turns the "best" model into a production-grade cost-effectiveness question. The optimal choice for startups may be the cheapest model that is "good enough" -- driving the rise of intelligent routers that start with cheap models and only escalate to expensive high-performance models when a task fails. The core skill for modern developers is no longer using a single model but rather systems architecture -- correctly identifying problems, selecting specialized models, and integrating them into efficient, cost-effective systems.

Concept 4: Constitutional AI (CAI) is Anthropic's core alignment technology. It builds safe, helpful, and honest AI systems through a two-stage self-correction process. In the supervised stage, the AI is given a set of "constitutional" principles and is then asked to critique and revise its own responses based on those principles. This self-corrected data is used to fine-tune the model. In the reinforcement learning stage, the process repeats, training a preference model to provide reward signals for standard fine-tuning. The result is an AI system aligned with an explicit, auditable set of principles, yielding the "significantly improved safety performance" demonstrated by Claude 4.5.

The conclusion of the 2026 AI race is that there is no single winner, but rather a portfolio of specialized systems. The gap at the top is so narrow that the "best" model is no longer a simple "who" but a "which" -- which model is designed for your specific task? For general conversation and human preference, Google Gemini 2.5 Pro leads; for autonomous coding and bug fixing, Claude 4.5 Sonnet is the champion; for long-context data processing, Meta's Llama 4 Scout changes the game with its 10-million-token context window. Ultimately, the winners of the "AI race" will be those who can correctly identify problems, select specialized models, and integrate them into efficient systems.

The rise of the open-source world is also an important part of this landscape. While closed-source models still hold an edge in capability, Meta's Llama 4 Scout -- with breakthrough features like a 10-million-token context window -- makes large-scale data analysis no longer limited to expensive closed-source APIs. Moonshot's Kimi K2, representing China's top AI competitiveness, ranked first on the Tau2 Bench telecommunications agent benchmark, proving that AI competition is no longer confined to the United States. This globally competitive landscape is accelerating the overall progress of AI technology.

Audio generation models can now produce music and speech that is nearly indistinguishable from the real thing. These advances are redefining the boundaries of the creative industry -- from advertising design to film production, from music composition to game development.

paragraphs.cn: 在科学发现赛道上，AI正在成为研究人员的「超级助手」。DeepMind的AlphaFold 3将蛋白质结构预测扩展到几乎所有的生物分子。AI在材料科学中发现了新催化剂和新超导材料候选。在数学领域，AI系统开始协助证明长期未解决的猜想。在药物发现中，AI将候选药物的筛选时间从数年缩短到数月。
paragraphs.en: In the scientific discovery track, AI is becoming a "super assistant" for researchers. DeepMind's AlphaFold 3 has extended protein structure prediction to nearly all biological molecules. AI has discovered new catalysts and candidate superconducting materials in materials science. In mathematics, AI systems are beginning to help prove long-standing conjectures. In drug discovery, AI has reduced candidate drug screening time from years to months.

paragraphs.cn: 开源生态的蓬勃发展是2026年AI领域最令人鼓舞的趋势之一。Llama 4、DeepSeek V4、Qwen 3和Mistral系列等开源模型在能力和效率上持续追赶闭源前沿，为企业提供了灵活且经济的选择。选择正确的AI模型需要理解几个关键维度：任务类型、部署约束、成本预算和安全合规要求。在这个多元竞争的时代，理解选择的权衡，比选择本身更加重要。
paragraphs.en: The thriving open-source ecosystem is one of the most encouraging trends in AI in 2026. Open-source models like Llama 4, DeepSeek V4, Qwen 3, and the Mistral series continue to close the gap with closed-source frontiers in capability and efficiency, offering enterprises flexible and cost-effective alternatives. Choosing the right AI model requires understanding several key dimensions: task type, deployment constraints, cost budget, and security compliance requirements. In this era of multi-dimensional competition, understanding the trade-offs matters more than the choice itself.

paragraphs.cn: 在代码与自动化赛道上，AI编码已经从辅助工具进化为核心开发引擎。GitHub Copilot、Cursor和Claude Code等工具使得42%的新代码包含AI辅助生成的成分。SWE-bench基准测试显示，领先的AI编码Agent已经能够独立解决约70-80%的真实GitHub问题。但编码AI的竞争不仅在准确性上，更在于对项目上下文的理解深度、多文件协调能力和自主调试能力。Claude 4.5 Sonnet以70.6%的SWE-bench得分领先，展示了专门的编码能力。
paragraphs.en: In the code and automation track, AI coding has evolved from an assistive tool into a core development engine. Tools like GitHub Copilot, Cursor, and Claude Code now contribute to 42% of all new code. The SWE-bench benchmark shows that leading AI coding agents can independently resolve about 70-80% of real GitHub issues. But the competition in coding AI isn't just about accuracy -- it's about depth of project context understanding, multi-file coordination, and autonomous debugging. Claude 4.5 Sonnet leads with a 70.6% SWE-bench score, demonstrating specialized coding capability.

paragraphs.cn: 在创意生成赛道上，图像、视频和音频生成模型的质量突飞猛进。Midjourney v7在艺术视觉方面保持领先，Google Imagen 4在照片级真实感上表现出色。Sora和Runway Gen-3使AI视频生成从实验走向实用，支持从文本描述生成连贯的视频内容。这些进步正在重新定义创意产业的边界。
paragraphs.en: In the creative generation track, the quality of image, video, and audio generation models has advanced dramatically. Midjourney v7 maintains its lead in artistic visuals, while Google Imagen 4 excels in photorealistic fidelity. Sora and Runway Gen-3 have moved AI video generation from experimentation to practicality, supporting coherent video content generated from text descriptions. These advances are redefining the boundaries of the creative industry.

paragraphs.cn: 在科学发现赛道上，AI正在成为研究人员的「超级助手」。DeepMind的AlphaFold 3将蛋白质结构预测扩展到几乎所有的生物分子，提供了至少50%的改进。GNoME发现了38万个新的稳定材料候选。这些「发现引擎」与GPT-5等「知识引擎」形成了鲜明对比——前者创造新知识，后者重组现有知识。
paragraphs.en: In the scientific discovery track, AI is becoming a "super assistant" for researchers. DeepMind's AlphaFold 3 has extended protein structure prediction to nearly all biological molecules, delivering at least a 50% improvement. GNoME has discovered 380,000 new candidate stable materials. These "discovery engines" contrast sharply with "knowledge engines" like GPT-5 -- the former creates new knowledge, while the latter recombines existing knowledge.

paragraphs.cn: 从技术架构角度看，2026年有几个关键趋势值得关注。检索增强生成（RAG）是最经济高效的方法，通过将外部知识库的检索结果注入提示来增强LLM的能力。混合专家（MoE）架构是另一个关键创新——它允许模型拥有大量总参数但只激活其中一小部分，大幅提升了训练和推理效率。Kimi K2的万亿参数和Llama 4的1000万token上下文窗口都展示了这种架构的威力。
paragraphs.en: From a technical architecture perspective, several key trends in 2026 are worth watching. Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) is the most cost-effective approach, enhancing LLM capabilities by injecting retrieval results from external knowledge bases into prompts. Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) architecture is another critical innovation -- it allows models to have a large total parameter count while only activating a small fraction at a time, significantly improving training and inference efficiency. Kimi K2's trillion parameters and Llama 4's 10-million-token context window both showcase the power of this architecture.

paragraphs.cn: 选择正确的AI模型需要理解几个关键维度：任务类型、部署约束、成本预算和安全合规要求。在这个多元竞争的时代，理解选择的权衡，比选择本身更加重要。现代开发者的核心技能不再是使用单一模型，而是系统架构能力——正确识别问题，选择专精模型，并将其整合为高效、经济的系统。
paragraphs.en: Choosing the right AI model requires understanding several key dimensions: task type, deployment constraints, cost budget, and security compliance requirements. In this era of multi-dimensional competition, understanding the trade-offs matters more than the choice itself. The core skill for modern developers is no longer using a single model but rather systems architecture -- correctly identifying problems, selecting specialized models, and integrating them into efficient, cost-effective systems.

paragraphs.cn: 概念一：检索增强生成（RAG）是最经济高效的方法，通过将外部知识库的检索结果注入提示来增强LLM的能力。RAG的工作流程分为四个步骤：查询——用户提出问题；检索——查询被发送到检索器，在向量数据库中搜索最相关的文档片段；增强——将检索到的片段注入用户的提示中；生成——LLM使用增强后的提示生成有事实依据的回答。这种方法使AI系统能够利用实时数据和私有知识库，而无需进行昂贵的完整模型重训练。
paragraphs.en: Concept 1: Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) is the most cost-effective approach, enhancing LLM capabilities by injecting retrieval results from external knowledge bases into prompts. The RAG workflow has four steps: Query -- the user asks a question; Retrieval -- the query is sent to a retriever that searches a vector database for the most relevant document fragments; Augmentation -- the retrieved fragments are injected into the user's prompt; Generation -- the LLM uses the augmented prompt to produce a fact-grounded response. This approach enables AI systems to leverage real-time data and private knowledge bases without expensive full model retraining.

paragraphs.cn: 概念二：Transformer与混合专家（MoE）是2026年最关键的架构创新。传统的密集Transformer在处理每个token时都会激活所有参数，计算开销巨大。MoE模型用「稀疏」层替换单一的FFN层——包含一个「门控网络」（路由器）和多个小型「专家」。当token到达时，路由器只将它发送给少数几个专家。结果是模型可以拥有巨大的总参数量（如Kimi K2的万亿参数），但每次推理只使用其中的一小部分。这使得训练和推理的速度和效率大幅提升。
paragraphs.en: Concept 2: Transformers and Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) are the most critical architectural innovations of 2026. Traditional dense Transformers activate all parameters for every token, creating enormous computational overhead. MoE models replace the single FFN layer with "sparse" layers -- containing a "gating network" (router) and multiple small "experts." When a token arrives, the router sends it to only a few experts. The result is that a model can have a massive total parameter count (such as Kimi K2's trillion parameters) while using only a small fraction per inference. This dramatically improves both training and inference speed and efficiency.

paragraphs.cn: 概念三：混合Transformer-Mamba（Hymba）是架构的下一个进化方向，专为最大推理效率而设计。NVIDIA的Nemotron模型采用了这种架构，将大部分自注意力层替换为Mamba层，只保留足够的注意力头用于高分辨率回忆，同时使用高效的Mamba层进行上下文摘要。结果是「同等准确度」下推理速度提升「最高3倍」。
paragraphs.en: Concept 3: The hybrid Transformer-Mamba (Hymba) architecture represents the next evolutionary direction, designed for maximum inference efficiency. NVIDIA's Nemotron model adopts this architecture, replacing most self-attention layers with Mamba layers while retaining just enough attention heads for high-resolution recall, and using efficient Mamba layers for context summarization. The result is "up to 3x" inference speedup at "equivalent accuracy."

paragraphs.cn: 成本效益分析揭示了2026年AI竞争的另一个维度。Claude 4.5 Sonnet以每任务0.56美元的成本获得70.6%的SWE-bench得分，而GPT-5 mini以仅0.04美元的成本获得59.8%的得分。这使「最佳」模型变成了一个生产级的成本效益分析问题。创业公司的最佳选择可能是「足够好」的最便宜模型——这推动了智能路由器的兴起，先用便宜模型处理，只在任务失败时才升级到昂贵的高性能模型。现代开发者的核心技能不再是使用单一模型，而是系统架构能力——正确识别问题，选择专精模型，并将其整合为高效、经济的系统。
paragraphs.en: Cost-effectiveness analysis reveals another dimension of the 2026 AI competition. Claude 4.5 Sonnet achieves a 70.6% SWE-bench score at $0.56 per task, while GPT-5 mini achieves 59.8% at only $0.04 per task. This turns the "best" model into a production-grade cost-effectiveness question. The optimal choice for startups may be the cheapest model that is "good enough" -- driving the rise of intelligent routers that start with cheap models and only escalate to expensive high-performance models when a task fails. The core skill for modern developers is no longer using a single model but rather systems architecture -- correctly identifying problems, selecting specialized models, and integrating them into efficient, cost-effective systems.

paragraphs.cn: 概念四：宪法AI（CAI）是Anthropic的核心对齐技术。它通过两阶段的自纠正过程来构建安全、有用且诚实的AI系统。在监督阶段，AI被赋予一组「宪法」原则，然后被要求根据这些原则来批评和重写自己的回答。这些自纠正的数据被用于微调模型。在强化学习阶段，过程重复进行，训练一个偏好模型来为标准微调提供奖励信号。结果是AI系统对齐于一组明确的、可审查的原则，带来了Claude 4.5所展示的「显著改善的安全性能」。
paragraphs.en: Concept 4: Constitutional AI (CAI) is Anthropic's core alignment technology. It builds safe, helpful, and honest AI systems through a two-stage self-correction process. In the supervised stage, the AI is given a set of "constitutional" principles and is then asked to critique and revise its own responses based on those principles. This self-corrected data is used to fine-tune the model. In the reinforcement learning stage, the process repeats, training a preference model to provide reward signals for standard fine-tuning. The result is an AI system aligned with an explicit, auditable set of principles, yielding the "significantly improved safety performance" demonstrated by Claude 4.5.

paragraphs.cn: 2026年AI竞赛的结论是：不存在单一的赢家，而是一个专业系统的组合。顶级性能的差距如此之小，以至于「最佳」模型不再是一个简单的「谁」，而是一个「哪个」——哪个模型是为你的特定任务而设计的？对于通用对话和人类偏好，Google Gemini 2.5 Pro领先；对于自主编码和bug修复，Claude 4.5 Sonnet是冠军；对于长上下文数据处理，Meta的Llama 4 Scout以1000万token上下文窗口改变了游戏规则。最终，「AI竞赛」的胜利者将是那些能够正确识别问题、选择专精模型并将其整合为高效系统的人。
paragraphs.en: The conclusion of the 2026 AI race is that there is no single winner, but rather a portfolio of specialized systems. The gap at the top is so narrow that the "best" model is no longer a simple "who" but a "which" -- which model is designed for your specific task? For general conversation and human preference, Google Gemini 2.5 Pro leads; for autonomous coding and bug fixing, Claude 4.5 Sonnet is the champion; for long-context data processing, Meta's Llama 4 Scout changes the game with its 10-million-token context window. Ultimately, the winners of the "AI race" will be those who can correctly identify problems, select specialized models, and integrate them into efficient systems.

paragraphs.cn: 开源世界的崛起也是这一格局的重要组成部分。虽然闭源模型在能力上仍有优势，但Meta的Llama 4 Scout以1000万token上下文窗口这样的突破性特性，使大规模数据分析不再局限于昂贵的闭源API。Moonshot的Kimi K2作为中国顶尖AI竞争力的代表，在Tau2 Bench电信智能体基准上排名第一，证明了AI竞争已不再局限于美国。这种全球化竞争的格局正在加速AI技术的整体进步。
paragraphs.en: The rise of the open-source world is also an important part of this landscape. While closed-source models still hold an edge in capability, Meta's Llama 4 Scout -- with breakthrough features like a 10-million-token context window -- makes large-scale data analysis no longer limited to expensive closed-source APIs. Moonshot's Kimi K2, representing China's top AI competitiveness, ranked first on the Tau2 Bench telecommunications agent benchmark, proving that AI competition is no longer confined to the United States. This globally competitive landscape is accelerating the overall progress of AI technology.

articles.title: Agentic AI 的架构设计与自主性边界
articles.subtitle: 智能体AI的架构模式：自主性、工具使用与安全防护
articles.author: Anthropic Research / AI Safety Team
articles.summary: 随着AI Agent在复杂任务中的自主性不断提升，如何在保持效能的同时为其设立安全边界成为核心议题。本文探讨了Agent系统的三层架构：工具调用层、推理规划层与价值对齐层，以及如何实现最小权限自主性原则。
articles.content_cn:
构建智能体的架构：目的、范围与可靠性
Nowaczyk | 哈尔姆斯塔德大学
1 引言：目的、范围与架构可靠性
本章探讨构建智能体AI系统的架构选择，并分析这些选择如何影响可靠性。我们的核心主张简单明了：可靠性首先是一种架构属性。它源于我们将系统分解为组件的方式、界面的规范与执行方式，以及在负责推理、记忆和行动的各部分周围嵌入控制与保障环的方式。单个模型固然重要，但如果没有恰当的架构支撑，即使是最先进的模型也会表现不一致、无法审计，并在 novelty 面前显得脆弱。
本语境下的智能体AI，指的是系统通过决定下一步做什么、选择和使用工具、查阅和更新记忆，以及在约束条件下与环境交互来追求长期目标。智能体不仅仅是一个预测器；它是一个闭环中的决策者。它观察、规划（至少是选择）、行动和学习，通常在不确定性和部分可观测性下进行。
生成式AI指的是合成内容（文本、代码、图像、计划或中间表示）的模型——通常作为智能体内部的推理底层，或提供其他组件执行或验证的产物（查询、程序、模拟、解释）。在现代系统中，生成模型提供策略（如何推理和提出行动建议），而智能体架构则提供机制（建议如何被验证、制定、约束和记录）。
理解智能体生成式AI与传统自主智能体的关系至关重要，可以避免重复造轮子：许多关键概念已被长期研究并相对成熟；然而，生成式AI的本质也带来了全新的挑战，需要重新审视曾经的定论。
传统的反应式、审慎式或BDI（信念-欲望-意图）架构为信念、目标、计划和意图等概念提供了理论基础和清晰定义，具有清晰的控制环和显式世界模型。现代智能体系统通常用神经网络基础模型取代手工设计的推理模块。这些在大规模多样数据上训练的模型极大地提高了灵活性和能力广度，但也引入了推理步骤和工具使用方面的不确定性。
本章保留经典观点的有用约束——显式状态、目标、计划、承诺策略和监控——同时承认管道的某些部分（如计划生成或假设形成）可能由生成模型实现。这种协调正是架构发挥价值之处。
我们所说的可靠性，是指在规定条件下持续达成预期成果，并保持在安全、安保、数据保护和资源使用的可接受范围内，且有证据表明故障模式已知、受控且可恢复。对于智能体AI而言，这远不止模型准确性，还包括正确的工具调用、有边界的行动序列、对操纵的抵抗、可预测的延迟和成本，以及 graceful degradation、审计能力和人工覆盖路径。
架构通过以下方式使这些属性变得可处理：（i）在其契约可推理的模块中隔离职责；（ii）在推理与行动之间插入验证器和核查器；（iii）通过授权工具接口约束权威性和副作用；以及（iv）为系统配备仪表，使内部状态、决策和结果可观测且可重放。
在实践中，三个相互加强的设计选择决定了智能体系统在压力下的行为。组件化：将感知、记忆、规划、工具路由、执行、验证和监督等功能分离，将故障限制在明确界定的边界内，并限制其影响范围。接口与契约：将自由形式的模型输出转换为可预测的、可审计的行动。控制与保障环：监控器将计划行为与观察行为进行比较，批评者和验证器核查事实性和安全不变性，监督者执行预算和终止标准。
2 经典理论基础
2.1 反应式、审慎式与混合架构
反应式架构通过手工编码的条件-动作规则或学习策略将感知直接映射到行动。其优势是低延迟和对轻微分布偏移的鲁棒性；其劣势是在需要 lookahead、长期信用分配或对隐藏状态推理的任务面前表现脆弱。典型故障包括：短视反应（缺乏显式规划）、部分可观测性和未建模延迟。
审慎式架构维护世界的显式模型，并使用搜索或规划来选择行动。它们在可解释性和目标一致性方面表现出色，但可能遭受延迟和模型不匹配的困扰。典型故障包括：过时计划在快速变化的环境中变得不合适、模型不完备和计算超时。
混合架构将两种方法相结合：反应式层处理紧密控制环，审慎式层提供目标、约束和重规划。混合架构仍然是最实用的智能体AI模板，因为它们分离了关注点：需要行动的地方有快速安全，需要推理的地方有慢速监督层。故障通常源于层之间的协调缺陷，而非某一层单独的问题。
2.2 信念-欲望-意图（BDI）模型
BDI将代理框架为对信念（信息状态）、欲望（允许的目标）和意图（已采纳的计划/承诺）的管理。两个观点使BDI经久不衰：承诺策略（智能体在条件成立时坚持意图，因为承诺创造可预测性并减少颠簸）和意图修订（当触发条件或上下文改变时，智能体重新考虑意图并可能放弃、暂停或替换意图）。
映射到现代生成式AI智能体：信念→世界状态和记忆；欲望→目标和约束；意图→活跃计划和工具调用。BDI还阐明了将保障层置于何处的依据：采纳过滤器决定候选目标何时成为意图；执行监控跟踪上下文是否仍然支持该意图；重规划策略规定智能体重新规划的频率和信号。
3 现代智能体架构分类
现代智能体系统不是单一的整体设计，而是不同构建块——规划环、工具路由器、记忆层、验证器和监督者——围绕生成式推理核心的组合。五类架构在实践中反复出现。
3.1 工具使用型智能体
工具使用型智能体让生成模型决定调用哪些外部能力、用什么参数、按什么顺序来完成目标。三个关键角色：规划器生成意图结构（子目标、假设、候选行动）；工具路由器将抽象行动映射到具体工具；执行沙箱执行前提条件检查，对每次调用进行速率限制和授权，在可能的情况下进行模拟，并以事务性方式（或回滚）提交副作用。
关键工程选择：类型化模式和验证器（将每次工具调用视为契约，拒绝不匹配，结构化错误反馈）；幂等工具和请求去重（副作用工具应接受幂等令牌，安全重试）；基于能力的授权（最小权限绑定工具，per-call政策核查）；事务语义和补偿（当ACID不可用时使用saga模式）；预算和终止标准（执行步数上限、累计成本上限和墙上时钟超时）；确定性可观测性（以结构化形式记录计划、工具参数、结果和决策理由）。
典型故障模式和缓解：幻觉工具或参数可通过允许列表、模式验证和路由器批准来应对；无限或不生产的循环通过步数上限和安全停止来约束；工具不稳定需要"设计用于重试"思维和断路器；提示或检索注入需要消毒工具输出，剥离控制令牌，将任何不受信任的文本视为数据而非指令。核心原则：模型提议，架构处置。
3.2 记忆增强型智能体
智能体系统在能够记忆时会显著变得更加能干。工作记忆是episode内短暂存在的上下文（草稿本、CoT痕迹）；长期记忆分为情景存储（先前任务的Structured日志）和语义存储（文档、事实）。检索增强生成（RAG）提供了进入语义记忆的非参数路径。
为可靠性而设计记忆需要：溯源与归属（每个检索或持久化的条目应携带源标识符、内容哈希、时间戳和检索政策/版本）；新鲜度和有效期限（引入按来源的TTL和访问时刷新政策）；记忆卫生与污染防御（将所有不受信任的文本视为数据而非指令）；压缩、摘要与保留策略（冷存储保留无损Structured日志，中期召回保留摘要热存以便快速访问）。
3.3 规划与自我改进型智能体
规划型智能体通过显式搜索、外部执行器和自我评估环来加强模型的原始推理。思维树（ToT）将推理组织为对中间思想的搜索，而非单一从左到右的传递，使智能体能够从早期局部错误中恢复。思维图（GoT）将其推广到任意依赖图，允许子图的重组、摘要或优化。程序辅助语言模型（PAL）将推理转向可执行程序，由外部运行时执行，产生精确、确定性的计算。反思（Reflexion）在推理时增加自我评估和测试时修复，将反馈转化为结构化指导。
3.4 多智能体系统
多智能体系统用一组专业智能体团队取代单一全能智能体。三种拓扑：监督器-工作者（协调者负责任务分解和分配，权威和升级路径清晰）；对等协作（协议规则驱动收敛）；角色专业智能体（拍卖和黑板系统）。核心原则：模型提议，架构处置——通过将开放式推理转换为可靠行动的契约、调控器和沙箱。

Chapter 3: Architectures for Building Agentic AI
Slawomir Nowaczyk
1 Introduction: Purpose, Scope, and Architecture Reliability
This chapter surveys architectural choices for building agentic AI systems and analyses how those choices shape reliability. Our central claim is straightforward: reliability is, first and foremost, an architectural property. It emerges from how we decompose a system into components, how we specify and enforce interfaces between them, and how we embed control and assurance loops around the parts that reason, remember, and act.
Individual models matter, but without the right architectural scaffolding, even state-of-the-art models will behave inconsistently, be impossible to audit, and prove fragile in the face of novelty.
Agentic AI in this book denotes systems that pursue goals over time by deciding what to do next, selecting and using tools, consulting and updating memory, and interacting with their environment under constraints. An agent is not merely a predictor; it is a decision-maker in a closed loop. It observes, plans (or at least chooses), acts, and learns, typically under uncertainty and partial observability.
Generative AI refers to models that synthesise content—text, code, images, plans, or intermediate representations—often serving as the reasoning substrate inside the agent, or providing artefacts (queries, programs, simulations, explanations) that other components execute or verify. In modern systems, generative models supply the policy (how to reason and propose actions), while the agentic architecture supplies the machinery (how proposals are validated, enacted, bounded, and recorded).
Understanding the relation of Agentic GenAI with classic autonomous agents is crucially important to avoid reinventing the wheel: many key concepts have been studied for a long time and are relatively well-understood today; however, the nature of GenAI also brings up challenges that are completely novel and require rethinking of what was believed to be known.
Traditional reactive, deliberative, or BDI (belief-desire-intention) architectures offer theoretically-founded and crisp notions of concepts such as beliefs, goals, plans, and intentions, with clear control loops and explicit world models. Modern agentic systems often replace hand-engineered reasoning with neural-network-based foundation models. These models, trained on huge amounts of diverse data, vastly increase the flexibility and breadth of competence, but also introduce uncertainty in reasoning steps and tool usage.
By reliability, we mean the consistent achievement of intended outcomes under stated conditions, within acceptable bounds of safety, security, data protection, and resource usage, and with evidence that failure modes are known, contained, and recoverable. For agentic AI, this encompasses much more than just model accuracy. It includes correct tool invocation, bounded action sequences, resistance to manipulation, predictable latency and cost, graceful degradation, auditability, and human-override paths.
Architectures make these properties tractable by: (i) isolating responsibilities in modules whose contracts we can reason about; (ii) interposing validators and verifiers between reasoning and action; (iii) constraining authority and side-effects through permissioned tool interfaces; and (iv) instrumenting the system so that internal state, decisions, and outcomes are observable and replayable.
Three mutually reinforcing design choices determine how agentic systems behave under stress:
Componentisation: Separating functionality such as perception, memory, planning, tool routing, execution, verification, and oversight confines faults to well-defined boundaries and limits their blast radius. Clear responsibilities make defects diagnosable and upgrades safe: a verifier can be strengthened without disturbing the planner; an execution gateway can be hardened without touching memory logic.
Interfaces and contracts: Primary means to tame open-ended model behaviour are typed and schema-validated messages; explicit capability scopes for tools; idempotent and (where feasible) transactional semantics; rate/authority limits. All of these convert free-form model outputs into predictable, auditable actions.
Control and assurance loops: Monitors compare planned with observed behaviour; critics and verifiers check factuality, policy compliance, and safety invariants; supervisors enforce budgets, escalation rules, and termination criteria; fallbacks provide safe modes of operation when assumptions fail.
2 Classical Foundations
2.1 Reactive, Deliberative, and Hybrid Architectures
Reactive architectures map perceptions directly to actions through hand-coded condition–action rules or learned policies. Their strength is low latency and robustness to minor distributional shifts; their weakness is brittleness when tasks require look-ahead, long-horizon credit assignment, or reasoning about hidden state. Typical failure modes include myopic responses (lack of explicit planning), partial observability, and unmodelled delays.
Deliberative architectures maintain explicit models of the world and use search or planning to choose actions. They excel at explainability and goal consistency but can suffer from latency and model mismatch. Typical failures include stale plans, model incompleteness, and computational overrun.
Hybrid architectures combine the two approaches: reactive layers handle tight control loops, while deliberative layers provide goals, constraints, and re-planning. Hybrids remain the most practical template for agentic AI because they separate concerns: fast safety where the action is; slow reasoning in supervisory layers.
2.2 Belief–Desire–Intention (BDI) Architecture
BDI frames agency as the management of Beliefs (informational state), Desires (admissible goals), and Intentions (adopted plans/commitments). Two ideas make BDI enduring: commitment strategies (agents stick to intentions while conditions hold, creating predictability) and intention revision (when context changes, agents reconsider and may drop or replace intentions).
Mapping to modern GenAI agents is straightforward: Beliefs → world state and memory; Desires → goals and constraints; Intentions → active plans and tool calls. BDI clarifies where to place assurance: adoption filters decide when a goal becomes an intention; execution monitors track whether context still supports the intention; reconsideration policies specify how often and under what signals the agent re-plans.
3 A Taxonomy of Modern Agentic Architectures
Modern agentic systems are not single, monolithic designs, but compositions of different building blocks—planning loops, tool routers, memory layers, verifiers, and supervisors—typically stitched together around a core of generative reasoning.
Five families recur in practice:
3.1 Tool-Using Agents
Tool-using agents place a generative model in charge of deciding which external capabilities to invoke, with what arguments, and in what order, to accomplish a goal. A robust implementation separates three concerns: Planners generate intentional structure; Tool routers map abstract actions to concrete tools; Execution sandboxes perform pre-condition checks, rate-limit and permission each call, simulate where possible, and commit side-effects transactionally.
Key engineering choices: Typed schemas and validators; idempotent tools and request deduplication; capability-based permissioning; transactional semantics and compensations; budgets and termination criteria; deterministic observability.
3.2 Memory-Augmented Agents
Agentic systems become markedly more capable when they can remember. Working memory is a short-lived context (scratchpads, CoT traces); long-term memory splits into episodic stores (structured logs of prior tasks) and semantic stores (documents, facts). Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) provides a non-parametric pathway into semantic memory.
Designing memory for reliability requires: Provenance and attribution (every retrieved item should carry source identifiers, content hash, timestamp); Freshness and validity windows (time-to-live policies by source); Memory hygiene and poisoning defences (sanitise all untrusted text); Compaction, summarisation, and retention policies.
3.3 Planning and Self-Improvement Agents
Planning-centred agents strengthen reasoning with explicit search, external executors, and self-evaluation loops. Tree of Thoughts (ToT) organises inference as a search over intermediate thoughts; Graph of Thoughts (GoT) generalises to arbitrary dependency graphs; Program-Aided Language models (PAL) shift reasoning to executable programs; Reflexion adds self-evaluation and test-time repair without gradient updates.
3.4 Multi-Agent Systems
Multi-agent systems exchange a single "do-everything" agent for a team of specialised agents that co-operate under explicit protocols. Three topologies have emerged: Supervisor–worker (clear authority and escalation paths); Peer collaboration (protocol rules drive convergence); Role-specialised agents (auctions and blackboard systems).
The guiding principle across all patterns: models propose, architectures dispose—with contracts, governors, and sandboxes that convert open-ended reasoning into reliable action.

构建智能体的架构：目的、范围与可靠性
Nowaczyk | 哈尔姆斯塔德大学
1 引言：目的、范围与架构可靠性
本章探讨构建智能体AI系统的架构选择，并分析这些选择如何影响可靠性。我们的核心主张简单明了：可靠性首先是一种架构属性。它源于我们将系统分解为组件的方式、界面的规范与执行方式，以及在负责推理、记忆和行动的各部分周围嵌入控制与保障环的方式。单个模型固然重要，但如果没有恰当的架构支撑，即使是最先进的模型也会表现不一致、无法审计，并在 novelty 面前显得脆弱。
本语境下的智能体AI，指的是系统通过决定下一步做什么、选择和使用工具、查阅和更新记忆，以及在约束条件下与环境交互来追求长期目标。智能体不仅仅是一个预测器；它是一个闭环中的决策者。它观察、规划（至少是选择）、行动和学习，通常在不确定性和部分可观测性下进行。
生成式AI指的是合成内容（文本、代码、图像、计划或中间表示）的模型——通常作为智能体内部的推理底层，或提供其他组件执行或验证的产物（查询、程序、模拟、解释）。在现代系统中，生成模型提供策略（如何推理和提出行动建议），而智能体架构则提供机制（建议如何被验证、制定、约束和记录）。
理解智能体生成式AI与传统自主智能体的关系至关重要，可以避免重复造轮子：许多关键概念已被长期研究并相对成熟；然而，生成式AI的本质也带来了全新的挑战，需要重新审视曾经的定论。
传统的反应式、审慎式或BDI（信念-欲望-意图）架构为信念、目标、计划和意图等概念提供了理论基础和清晰定义，具有清晰的控制环和显式世界模型。现代智能体系统通常用神经网络基础模型取代手工设计的推理模块。这些在大规模多样数据上训练的模型极大地提高了灵活性和能力广度，但也引入了推理步骤和工具使用方面的不确定性。
本章保留经典观点的有用约束——显式状态、目标、计划、承诺策略和监控——同时承认管道的某些部分（如计划生成或假设形成）可能由生成模型实现。这种协调正是架构发挥价值之处。
我们所说的可靠性，是指在规定条件下持续达成预期成果，并保持在安全、安保、数据保护和资源使用的可接受范围内，且有证据表明故障模式已知、受控且可恢复。对于智能体AI而言，这远不止模型准确性，还包括正确的工具调用、有边界的行动序列、对操纵的抵抗、可预测的延迟和成本，以及 graceful degradation、审计能力和人工覆盖路径。
架构通过以下方式使这些属性变得可处理：（i）在其契约可推理的模块中隔离职责；（ii）在推理与行动之间插入验证器和核查器；（iii）通过授权工具接口约束权威性和副作用；以及（iv）为系统配备仪表，使内部状态、决策和结果可观测且可重放。
在实践中，三个相互加强的设计选择决定了智能体系统在压力下的行为。组件化：将感知、记忆、规划、工具路由、执行、验证和监督等功能分离，将故障限制在明确界定的边界内，并限制其影响范围。接口与契约：将自由形式的模型输出转换为可预测的、可审计的行动。控制与保障环：监控器将计划行为与观察行为进行比较，批评者和验证器核查事实性和安全不变性，监督者执行预算和终止标准。
2 经典理论基础
2.1 反应式、审慎式与混合架构
反应式架构通过手工编码的条件-动作规则或学习策略将感知直接映射到行动。其优势是低延迟和对轻微分布偏移的鲁棒性；其劣势是在需要 lookahead、长期信用分配或对隐藏状态推理的任务面前表现脆弱。典型故障包括：短视反应（缺乏显式规划）、部分可观测性和未建模延迟。
审慎式架构维护世界的显式模型，并使用搜索或规划来选择行动。它们在可解释性和目标一致性方面表现出色，但可能遭受延迟和模型不匹配的困扰。典型故障包括：过时计划在快速变化的环境中变得不合适、模型不完备和计算超时。
混合架构将两种方法相结合：反应式层处理紧密控制环，审慎式层提供目标、约束和重规划。混合架构仍然是最实用的智能体AI模板，因为它们分离了关注点：需要行动的地方有快速安全，需要推理的地方有慢速监督层。故障通常源于层之间的协调缺陷，而非某一层单独的问题。
2.2 信念-欲望-意图（BDI）模型
BDI将代理框架为对信念（信息状态）、欲望（允许的目标）和意图（已采纳的计划/承诺）的管理。两个观点使BDI经久不衰：承诺策略（智能体在条件成立时坚持意图，因为承诺创造可预测性并减少颠簸）和意图修订（当触发条件或上下文改变时，智能体重新考虑意图并可能放弃、暂停或替换意图）。
映射到现代生成式AI智能体：信念→世界状态和记忆；欲望→目标和约束；意图→活跃计划和工具调用。BDI还阐明了将保障层置于何处的依据：采纳过滤器决定候选目标何时成为意图；执行监控跟踪上下文是否仍然支持该意图；重规划策略规定智能体重新规划的频率和信号。
3 现代智能体架构分类
现代智能体系统不是单一的整体设计，而是不同构建块——规划环、工具路由器、记忆层、验证器和监督者——围绕生成式推理核心的组合。五类架构在实践中反复出现。
3.1 工具使用型智能体
工具使用型智能体让生成模型决定调用哪些外部能力、用什么参数、按什么顺序来完成目标。三个关键角色：规划器生成意图结构（子目标、假设、候选行动）；工具路由器将抽象行动映射到具体工具；执行沙箱执行前提条件检查，对每次调用进行速率限制和授权，在可能的情况下进行模拟，并以事务性方式（或回滚）提交副作用。
关键工程选择：类型化模式和验证器（将每次工具调用视为契约，拒绝不匹配，结构化错误反馈）；幂等工具和请求去重（副作用工具应接受幂等令牌，安全重试）；基于能力的授权（最小权限绑定工具，per-call政策核查）；事务语义和补偿（当ACID不可用时使用saga模式）；预算和终止标准（执行步数上限、累计成本上限和墙上时钟超时）；确定性可观测性（以结构化形式记录计划、工具参数、结果和决策理由）。
典型故障模式和缓解：幻觉工具或参数可通过允许列表、模式验证和路由器批准来应对；无限或不生产的循环通过步数上限和安全停止来约束；工具不稳定需要"设计用于重试"思维和断路器；提示或检索注入需要消毒工具输出，剥离控制令牌，将任何不受信任的文本视为数据而非指令。核心原则：模型提议，架构处置。
3.2 记忆增强型智能体
智能体系统在能够记忆时会显著变得更加能干。工作记忆是episode内短暂存在的上下文（草稿本、CoT痕迹）；长期记忆分为情景存储（先前任务的Structured日志）和语义存储（文档、事实）。检索增强生成（RAG）提供了进入语义记忆的非参数路径。
为可靠性而设计记忆需要：溯源与归属（每个检索或持久化的条目应携带源标识符、内容哈希、时间戳和检索政策/版本）；新鲜度和有效期限（引入按来源的TTL和访问时刷新政策）；记忆卫生与污染防御（将所有不受信任的文本视为数据而非指令）；压缩、摘要与保留策略（冷存储保留无损Structured日志，中期召回保留摘要热存以便快速访问）。
3.3 规划与自我改进型智能体
规划型智能体通过显式搜索、外部执行器和自我评估环来加强模型的原始推理。思维树（ToT）将推理组织为对中间思想的搜索，而非单一从左到右的传递，使智能体能够从早期局部错误中恢复。思维图（GoT）将其推广到任意依赖图，允许子图的重组、摘要或优化。程序辅助语言模型（PAL）将推理转向可执行程序，由外部运行时执行，产生精确、确定性的计算。反思（Reflexion）在推理时增加自我评估和测试时修复，将反馈转化为结构化指导。
3.4 多智能体系统
多智能体系统用一组专业智能体团队取代单一全能智能体。三种拓扑：监督器-工作者（协调者负责任务分解和分配，权威和升级路径清晰）；对等协作（协议规则驱动收敛）；角色专业智能体（拍卖和黑板系统）。核心原则：模型提议，架构处置——通过将开放式推理转换为可靠行动的契约、调控器和沙箱。
